overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a smooth descent along a futuristic megastructure from section '06' to '07'. The camera reveals an industrial district with yellow smoke emissions, complex highway interchanges, and a large flying vehicle passing through the hazy morning light.

agents.ego_description: slowly descending along the building facade while panning right to reveal the futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: tall industrial building section marked with illuminated '06' signage
dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel towers in the city center
white cylindrical storage tanks visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude view from alongside building '06', overlooking a sprawling futuristic metropolis. The camera slowly descends and pans right, revealing industrial structures and the distant city skyline bathed in warm morning light.

events.description: camera descends from high-rise tower to industrial rooftop level with yellow smoke emissions
lighting shifts to partial shadow as camera moves under the building overhang

agents.ego_description: continuing the descent past industrial rooftops emitting thick yellow smoke

entered.detail: tall industrial building section marked with illuminated '07' signage
lower industrial buildings with mechanical equipment and ventilation structures
thick yellow-orange emissions rising from industrial vents

segments.scene_description: The camera descends past building '06' into an industrial zone marked by yellow smoke plumes rising from ventilation systems. Building '07' comes into view on the right as the camera moves under an overhang, creating mixed lighting conditions.

events.description: large flying vehicle enters the frame from the left side
camera movement slows and stabilizes into a wide panoramic view

agents.ego_description: tracking the flying vehicle while revealing the complex highway interchange below

notable_agents.action: large flying vehicle moving horizontally across the cityscape from left to right

entered.detail: large aerial transport vehicle with glowing elements flying above the city
complex multi-level highway ramps and overpasses with moving traffic
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: A flying vehicle enters the scene from the left, moving across the frame as the camera reveals a massive highway interchange below. Building '07' remains prominent on the right while distant mountains emerge through the haze, and the camera stabilizes into a sweeping panoramic view of the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a high-altitude vantage point alongside a megastructure into a hazy, industrial urban canyon. It begins with a sweeping view from building 06, panning right to reveal a sprawling futuristic metropolis bathed in the warm glow of morning light. As the camera descends, the scene shifts into a dense industrial zone where yellow smoke plumes rise from ventilation systems and the architecture of building 07 emerges on the right. The perspective then glides under a structural overhang into mixed lighting before a flying vehicle crosses the frame, drawing the eye toward a massive highway interchange below. Finally, the camera stabilizes into a wide panoramic view, revealing distant mountains emerging through the haze beyond the urban landscape.
